titleStmt.title: SII 38.302: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 302. (A.R. No. 302 of 1912.) ATTI, CHEYYAR TALUK, NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT. On the south wall, Kariyaperumāḷ temple.

summary.p: This incomplete inscription records a grant of four-thousand kuḻi of land, in several piecesBut if the total extent of all the pieces of land are added it is four-thousand nine kuḻi of land.at PeriyanallUr in KAliyūr-kōTTam, inclusive of all taxes, nellāyam, kāśAyam and other miscellaneous taxes, except pāḍikāval, collected on this land, as tiruviḍaiyāTTam, to the god of Edirilichōḻa-viṇṇagar (temple) at Atti in VeṇkuṉṟakōTTam by prince Rājarāja Sambhuvarāyar, for carrying out repairs and renovation to the courtyard of the temple, which had been in a dilapidated condition. It is also stated that the duty of carrying out the repairs was entrusted to ŚrIrāma Bhaṭṭaṉ and other (priests).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīvijayakaṇṭa kopāladevaṟku yāṇṭu Eṭṭāvatu veṇkuṉṟakkoṭṭattu Attiyil Etirilicoḻaviṇṇakar Empe
rumāṉukku piḷḷaiyār Irācaraācacampuvarāyar kāliyūrkoṭṭattu periyanallūril tiruviṭaiyāṭṭamāka viṭṭa teṟkil Ēriyil Eḻupatiṉ kalavaricaippaṟṟi
l toṭṭac ceṟu kuḻi nāṉūṟṟuorupattuiraṇṭum poṉmāṟi kuḻi nāṉūṟṟuirupattueṭṭum caṭaicci kuḻi munnūṟṟumuppate kālum tiruvaraṅkaṉ
kuḻi nāṉūṟṟumuppattunālum naṅkaṇic ceṟu kuḻi munnūṟṟu Orupattueṭṭaraiyearaikkālum ceruvaṉ kuḻi nūṟṟu muppatum pulivalavaṉ taṭi Iraṇṭiṉā
l kuḻi nāṉūṟṟu Irupattiraṇṭe kālum Apaiyatāṉi kuḻi Irunūṟṟu Irupattoṉpate Araikkālum ceppu ceṟu kuḻi Aṟu nūṟṟunāṟpattumuṉṟum meṟpaṭi kuṇṭil kuḻi E
ḻupatum mallaṭi vaṭṭam kuḻi AiññūṟThe letter pure consonant ‘ṟ’ is found engraved below in smaller form.ṟutoṇṇūṟṟumuṉṟum Ākak kuḻi nālāyiramum pāṭikāval nikki Aṉaittu nellāyamum kācāyaṅkaḷum tarattil varum kācukaṭamaiyum Uṭpaṭa tiruvi
ṭaiyāṭṭamāka viṭṭom Innāḷ mutal Ittirumuṟṟam jīraṇittuk kiṭantapaṭiyāle Ittiruppaṇi ceyya veṇṭukaiyil Iccirāmabhaṭṭaṉ Uḷḷiṭṭārkke kāṇiyāka ku
ṭuttom Innāḷmutal Itukaḷukku Eṟa kaṭamaikuṭimai pokka
Digital edition of SII 38.302 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
